description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including several coniferous trees and flowering deciduous trees. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and a clean, geometric design, characterized by blue exterior walls and white trim. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a driveway leading to a single-car garage, and a paved walkway connects the entrance to the street. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of shrubs, small trees, and decorative plants, enhancing the curb appeal. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, blue and white exterior, large windows, and lush landscaping including coniferous and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped yard with coniferous and flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the bungalow, garage, and dense tree line along the property edge.
description_view_2: Side view with prominent flowering trees and a clear look at the flat roof and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and rear, with a focus on the garage, backyard landscaping, and multiple roof levels.
